## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — maintenance / deps
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change

## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds with no errors
- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] No commented-out code left behind
- [ ] Self-reviewed before requesting review
